open_questions.question: Confirm promotion threshold = priority 'must', tier by topic_kind, or supply a richer signal mix.
Confirm default breadth policy (cap 4 / split 6 / floor sum ceil(leaf/4)) before any live run.
Which high-risk families require human sign-off before live release.
Should deepwiki-scale become default for source-derived runs or stay opt-in.

assumptions.text: topic_kind=='family' distinguishes index-level from leaf topics.
priority=='must' is the correct promotion signal.
page_profile=='overview' is the only default index profile (tunable).

decisions.question: Scope of first delivery.
decisions.user_choice: Phase 2 promotion contract + anti-compression gates + data contract + CLI wiring + tests; downstream treats deepwiki-scale as expanded for now.
